title: crepidaria
intro:
Crepidaria is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family of gentian. It is also known as gentianella or gentianella amarella. The medicinal properties of crepidaria include its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of crepidaria include its potential to help with respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and its ability to improve digestion and reduce stress. 

Herbal preparations of crepidaria can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat various health conditions.
